items.title: Real-World Outcomes of Dedicated Leaflet Modification for Bioprosthetic Valve-in-Valve TAVR: A 150-Patient Commercial Experience
items.title_zh: 瓣中瓣 TAVR 瓣叶机械劈开装置真实世界数据：150 例商业化经验
items.summary_zh: 发表于 JACC: Cardiovascular Interventions 的真实世界研究纳入 28 家中心 150 例接受瓣中瓣 TAVR(ViV-TAVR)的高危患者(2025 年 2-11 月入组),术前 CT 显示 87% 存在急性冠脉阻塞风险;145 例尝试使用 ShortCut 专用导管行瓣叶机械劈开,操作成功率达 99%(57% 为双瓣叶劈开),术后冠脉阻塞发生率仅 2%,为该专用瓣叶劈开技术在 ViV-TAVR 高危解剖患者中的安全性与有效性提供了商业化后的真实世界证据。
items.summary_en: A JACC: Cardiovascular Interventions real-world study of 150 high-risk valve-in-valve TAVR patients across 28 centers (Feb–Nov 2025) found 87% had CT-predicted coronary obstruction risk; among 145 who underwent ShortCut mechanical leaflet splitting, procedural success was 99% (57% dual-leaflet split) and post-procedure coronary obstruction occurred in just 2%, backing the dedicated leaflet-splitting catheter's safety and efficacy in commercial use.

items.title: REPAIR Suggests Favorable M-TEER Results Possible in Small Mitral Valves
items.title_zh: REPAIR 注册研究：小二尖瓣瓣口面积患者行 M-TEER 仍可获良好疗效
items.summary_zh: REPAIR 注册研究纳入德国 14 家中心 2019-2024 年间接受 Pascal 系统经导管缘对缘修复(M-TEER)的 1,189 例重度二尖瓣反流患者,在纽约瓣膜会议(New York Valves 2026)公布最新分析。其中 28% 患者基线二尖瓣瓣口面积小于 4 cm²;结果显示瓣口面积偏小并未显著影响手术成功率与临床获益,为小瓣口这一解剖挑战人群行 M-TEER 提供了真实世界支持证据。
items.summary_en: The REPAIR registry — 1,189 patients with severe mitral regurgitation treated with Pascal M-TEER across 14 German centers (2019–2024) — presented new analyses at New York Valves 2026. With 28% of patients having a baseline mitral valve orifice area under 4 cm², a small orifice area did not meaningfully affect procedural success or clinical benefit, offering real-world reassurance for M-TEER in this anatomically challenging subgroup.

items.title: Glucocorticoids to reduce permanent pacemaker implantation after TAVI: the GLUCO-TAVI randomised trial
items.title_zh: GLUCO-TAVI 随机试验：糖皮质激素能否减少 TAVI 后永久起搏器植入？
items.summary_zh: GLUCO-TAVI 随机对照试验(EuroIntervention 2026;22:545-554)纳入 100 例接受 TAVI 的重度主动脉瓣狭窄患者,随机分配至术前 1 小时静脉甲泼尼龙联合术后 5 天口服泼尼松组,或标准治疗组。结果显示糖皮质激素方案可行且安全,1 个月时永久起搏器植入率呈数值下降但未达统计学显著性,提示该策略预防 TAVI 后传导阻滞的潜在获益仍需更大样本的试验证实。
items.summary_en: The GLUCO-TAVI randomized trial (EuroIntervention 2026;22:545-554) enrolled 100 severe aortic stenosis patients undergoing TAVI, randomizing them to peri-procedural IV methylprednisolone plus 5 days of oral prednisone versus standard care. Glucocorticoids proved feasible and safe, with a numerical but not statistically significant reduction in 1-month permanent pacemaker implantation — a signal that needs confirmation in a larger trial.

items.title: Prognostic value of early haemodynamic valve deterioration after TAVI
items.title_zh: TAVI 术后早期血流动力学瓣膜功能减退的预后价值
items.summary_zh: 一项国际多中心注册研究(16 家中心,发表于 EuroIntervention,并作为 EuroPCR 2026 Hotline 由 Trimaille 等报告)将 TAVI 术后 3 个月内超声测得平均跨瓣压差较出院时升高 ≥10 mmHg 定义为“早期血流动力学瓣膜功能减退(early HVD)”。8 年随访显示,发生早期 HVD 的患者远期瓣膜相关临床获益更低、卒中风险更高,且出院时未处方口服抗凝是其独立预测因素,提示 TAVI 术后早期超声随访对识别高危患者、指导抗栓策略具有重要价值。
items.summary_en: An international multicentre registry (16 centres, published in EuroIntervention; presented as a EuroPCR 2026 Hotline by Trimaille and colleagues) defined early hemodynamic valve deterioration (HVD) as a ≥10 mmHg rise in mean transaortic gradient within 3 months post-TAVI versus discharge echo. Over 8 years of follow-up, early HVD was linked to lower long-term valve-related clinical efficacy and a higher stroke rate, with lack of discharge anticoagulation an independent predictor — underscoring the value of early post-TAVI echo surveillance for risk stratification.

items.title: Xenter Closes Series B Financing, Raising $58.25 Million to Accelerate Commercial Expansion of its TechMed Platform
items.title_zh: Xenter 完成 B 轮融资，筹集 5,825 万美元加速 TechMed 平台商业化并启动 TAVR 生理导丝临床测试
items.summary_zh: 医疗科技公司 Xenter 于 7 月 16 日宣布完成 5,825 万美元 B 轮融资,用于加速其 TechMed 诊断业务的首次商业化落地,并启动 Guru 双传感器生理导丝在经导管主动脉瓣置换(TAVR)术中的计划性临床测试。该无线导丝旨在术中实时采集主动脉瓣周漏(xAR)等生理数据,为术者提供额外的临床决策支持。
items.summary_en: Medtech company Xenter announced on July 16 the close of a $58.25 million Series B financing to fund the first commercial launch of its diagnostics business unit and begin planned clinical testing of its wireless Guru dual-sensor physiology guidewire during TAVR procedures. The guidewire is designed to capture real-time physiologic data, including an aortic-regurgitation (xAR) measurement, to support intraprocedural clinical decisions.
